title: FCMStart Property
description:
Begins recording of the sensor value, position and posture of the robot, and step ID using the force control monitor.

Immediate Execution

Yes
see_also:
Applies To

Force Monitor Object FM#

FCMEnd Property
examples:
Function FCMTest
   FSet FM1.ForceSensor, 1
   FSet FM1.FCMEnd
   FSet FM1.FCMStart, 1, 60, 0.1
   Wait 60
   FSet FM1.FCMEnd
Fend
